name: Rotary Unbalance Vibration Analysis
description: A mechanical engineer is designing a vibration isolation mount for a high-speed rotary tool. Programmatically construct a spring-mounted rotary unbalance mechanism in CoppeliaSim using the ZMQ Remote API. The mechanism must consist of a base mass attached to the world via a prismatic joint (acting as a spring-damper system), a rotor mass attached to the base via a revolute joint, and a radially offset unbalance mass, with all shapes configured as dynamic and respondable. Perform a frequency sweep from 2 to 20 rad/s to determine the steady-state peak-to-peak vibration amplitude of the base mass across the range. Export vibration_sweep.csv (columns: omega_rad_s, amplitude_m) and resonance_report.json (fields: total_sweep_steps, k_stiffness_n_m, m_total_kg, resonant_omega_rad_s, max_amplitude_m) to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/. Leave the simulation running or paused at the end of the script for verification. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
